task_completion.description: Open Crimson 3.0 and navigate to the Data Tags section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Crimson 3.0 interface is visible with the 'Data Tags' category selected in the left-hand Navigation Pane.

task_completion.description: Configure active tags DP_601 and TT_601 with correct data types, ranges, and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show DP_601 configured as Float, range 0.0-120.0, label 'Millibar'. TT_601 configured as Float, range 50.0-150.0, label 'Degrees Celsius'.

task_completion.description: Configure active tags VB_601 and FT_601 with correct data types, ranges, and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show VB_601 configured as Float, range 0.0-30.0, label 'Millimeters per Second'. FT_601 configured as Float, range 0.0-500.0, label 'Metric Tons per Hour'.

task_completion.description: Configure active tags SS_601 and BL_601 with correct data types, ranges, and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show SS_601 configured as Float, range 0.0-2000.0, label 'Revolutions per Minute'. BL_601 configured as Float, range 2000.0-6000.0, label 'Square Centimeters per Gram'.

task_completion.description: Ensure inactive tags DP_602 and TT_602 are NOT configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag list in the Navigation Pane does not contain DP_602 or TT_602, confirming the agent only configured the active VRM-1 tags.

task_completion.description: Save the project as 'cement_grinding.c3' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the Crimson 3.0 title bar shows the file saved as 'cement_grinding.c3' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\' folder.

integrity.description: Agent used the Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Crimson 3.0 interface, entering values into the property fields, rather than editing a raw file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file using the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The File -> Save As menu or standard Windows save dialog is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python windows are shown executing scripts to generate the .c3 file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Active tags to configure (all must be Float data type): DP_601 (0.0 to 120.0, Millibar), TT_601 (50.0 to 150.0, Degrees Celsius), VB_601 (0.0 to 30.0, Millimeters per Second), FT_601 (0.0 to 500.0, Metric Tons per Hour), SS_601 (0.0 to 2000.0, Revolutions per Minute), BL_601 (2000.0 to 6000.0, Square Centimeters per Gram). Inactive tags that MUST NOT be configured: DP_602, TT_602. The project must be saved exactly as 'cement_grinding.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\.
